name: alert-destructive
visual_summary: An alert-destructive component is a red alert box that warns users of a destructive action, typically displayed on hover or on click. It is used to draw attention and caution users before they make irreversible changes. This component is often used in forms and workflows where users need explicit confirmation.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready alert component with the following characteristics:

Name: alert-destructive
Description: An alert-destructive component is a red alert box that warns users of a destructive action, typically displayed on hover or on click. It is used to draw attention and caution users before they make irreversible changes. This component is often used in forms and workflows where users need explicit confirmation.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal, compact
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable, modal
Tags: alert, destructive, warning

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
